template_data.lead_html: Two years with a Schedule. SAM lapsed. The RFQ walked.

rows.what_html: Schedule active, SAM registered — waiting for the right federal opportunity
Inbound RFQ from an agency CO — found through SAM.gov market research
Registration flagged as lapsed — expired 3 weeks prior, CO moved on

template_data.closer: THE REGISTRATION EXPIRED. THE OPPORTUNITY DIDN'T WAIT.

image_prompt: Infographic story layout. Forest green and amber color palette, cream background, Sora typeface. Left side: illustrated professional man on a phone at his desk, expression shifting from hopeful to concerned, suit jacket. Right side: a vertical 3-step timeline path — clock icon labeled 'SCHEDULE ACTIVE', envelope icon labeled 'RFQ ARRIVES', red X icon labeled 'SAM LAPSED'. Bold headline centered at top: 'REGISTRATION EXPIRED'. Amber highlighted callout box with short phrase 'NO GRACE PERIOD'. Clean professional illustration style. Footer text: 'William Hill · GSA Focus'.
